title: Share Your World with Guests
highlights: Share Your World: Create a read-only link so players can explore the parts of your campaign you choose to share, even when you are offline.
Keep GM Notes Private: GM-only notes, art direction, and links to hidden content are automatically excluded from shared worlds.
Publish Without Pausing: Publishing shows its progress in the background, so you can close Settings and keep worldbuilding.
Manage Shared Worlds: Copy a public link, update what guests can see, or unpublish a world from one place in Settings.
Find Worlds Again: Guest views remember recently visited worlds on the device for quick access.

title: The Themed Generators & World Chronology Update
highlights: Calendar & Agenda View: Explore your world's chronology in a full calendar and agenda layout, with mobile swipe-to-navigate, a year-wheel picker, and double-click a date cell to create a pre-filled event.

Themed Generator Hubs: Dedicated generator landing pages and content packs for Western, Steampunk, Lancer, Space Opera, Optimistic Sci-Fi, Cyberpunk, and Vampire settings, reachable via nested /generators/[theme] routes.
Entity Explorer Workspace: A dedicated desktop explorer workspace with entity navigation history and keyboard shortcuts for fast back-and-forth movement through your vault.
Entity Revision via Oracle: Revise existing entities through the Gemini Interactions API, keeping edits grounded in your established lore.
Theme Polish: New and enhanced world textures plus an authentic Pip-Boy CRT theme with scanlines, phosphor glow, and vignette.
Smoother Graph Loading: Re-engineered the graph load pipeline for more reliable layout and fixed graph controls overlapping the footer.

title: The In-App Campaign Generator Update
highlights: Campaign Generators: Generate NPCs, factions, settlements, and magic items directly inside your vault using the new Generate button in the toolbar.
Review Before Save: Every generated draft is fully editable before it touches your vault — nothing is written until you confirm.
Theme-Aware Defaults: Generator options automatically bias toward your active world theme (gothic, cyberpunk, sci-fi, etc.) so results feel native to your setting.
AI + Local Fallback: Generation works with the Lore Oracle when connected, and falls back to local offline generation when AI is unavailable or disabled.
Contextual Launch: Open the generator from any entity to prefill relationship context and optionally link the result back to the source entity.

title: The Grounded Context-Aware Entity Creator Update
highlights: Context-Aware Related Entity Creator: Branch your setting organically using a new 'Generate Related' action that gathers the active entity and its first-degree graph neighbors to draft grounded entities.
Outline Template Injection: Integrates your vault's active theme templates to pre-structure the generated entity's markdown outline headings.
Adaptive Relationship Suggestions: The configuration dialog dynamically suggests relationships tailored to the source and target entity types (e.g. character to item suggests 'signature item').
Directed Connections: Persisting the drafted entity automatically registers a directed relationship link (Source → New Entity) in the campaign vault graph.

title: The Vault Save Confidence & Chronology Quality Update
highlights: Silent Permission Checks: Verification of directory permissions is now fully silent at startup, preventing annoying browser picker prompts when you open the app.
Clear Access Grants: A prominent 'GRANT ACCESS' button appears in the sidebar when a vault folder handle needs permission, making recovery simple and clear.
Instant Save Confirmation: The status indicator displays a clear 3-second 'SAVED' checkmark before returning to idle, with immediate keypress interruption if you start editing again.
Interrupt-Safe Vault Switching: A 5-second timeout during vault switching prevents the app from hanging if background saves get stuck, proceeding with the vault switch safely.

title: The Nested Entities & Explorer Polish Update
highlights: Deep Campaign Hierarchy: Nest folders and campaign notes up to 8 levels deep (previously 5) to organize massive campaign settings visually.

Re-engineered Drag-and-Drop: Rebuilt browser-native drag-and-drop to offer completely smooth, flicker-free moves with automatic parent-child cycle checking and a dedicated drop zone to promote folders back to the root level.
Inline Folder Creation: Hover over any explorer item and click '+' to instantly spawn and name nested child entities without opening full configuration dialogs.

HTML & ARIA Semantics: Rewrote explorer item rows as standard list items (role='listitem') containing a single interactive button, ensuring screen readers and keyboard navigation follow standard accessibility behavior.
Reload Persistence: Resolved a cache hydration issue, ensuring custom campaign folder nesting structures and visibility states correctly survive hard browser page reloads.

title: The Multi-Sensory & Interactive Chronology Update
highlights: Interactive Sound Bites: Bring your campaign characters to life with fully voiced quotes, customizable transcripts, and a beautiful floating player controls bar.
Live Audio Broadcasting: Play vocal performances directly on your players' devices in real-time, synchronized perfectly across all connected devices during a live session.
Instant Image Sharing: Project key illustrations, maps, and reference scenes instantly to all players' screens in full screen with elegant, immersive visual transitions.
Tactile Date Picker: A sleek, physical-feeling scroll-wheel calendar dial that makes setting dates and timelines a satisfying, fluid experience.
Prominent Entity Highlights: Easily mark key campaign figures and focal locations as 'important' to make them stand out on your network relationship graph.

title: The Autotagging & Search Autocomplete Update
highlights: Smart Historical Tagging: Entities representing historical characters, fallen factions, or past eras are now automatically marked as 'past' to streamline timeline filtering.
Fluid Tag Search: Selecting suggestions from the search box automatically transitions them into active sidebar filters, keeping your search bar clean and intuitive.
Snappy Search Autocomplete: The search suggestion menu is smarter and re-evaluates instantly as you type, making it effortless to build multi-tag queries.

title: The Art Direction Update
highlights: Default Art Prompts: Image generation now resolves consistent Art Direction before drawing, so visuals stay grounded in your world instead of starting from a generic prompt.
Category Defaults: Characters, creatures, locations, items, factions, events, notes, and world covers now receive composition guidance tailored to what you are drawing.
Theme-Aware Visual Style: Active world themes now contribute Default Art Style guidance for generated images while preserving stronger entity and note-based art direction.
World Cover Direction: Front page cover generation now combines world-cover composition with the active theme's visual style for more coherent campaign covers.
Lore-Native Customization: Add sections such as Art Direction, Default Art Style, or Visual Direction to normal notes/entities to guide image generation without a separate settings form.
Smarter Draw Commands: Commands like /draw character Almos can use category hints when no matched entity metadata is available, while real entity categories still take precedence.

title: The Dual-Layer Theming & Chrome Stabilization Update
highlights: Dual-Layer Appearance: App chrome and world genre themes are now separated, keeping navigation, settings, and workspace controls stable while vault themes change.
Neutral App Chrome: Headers, sidebars, panels, and status indicators now use consistent neutral light/dark styling instead of inheriting campaign texture and genre colors.
System Appearance Support: The workspace can follow the device's light or dark preference while preserving the active world theme for campaign content.
Theme Counterparts: Selectable world themes now resolve matching light and dark counterparts so campaign mood survives appearance changes.
Settings Clarity: Appearance controls now distinguish app-level display mode from vault-level world themes.

title: The Animated Transitions & State Persistence Update
highlights: Tactile Panel Opening: The entity detail panel now dynamically expands and scales directly from the node, button, or search result you clicked.
Mobile Bottom Sheet: The detail panel slides up smoothly as a clean bottom drawer on mobile displays to optimize reading space.
Navigational Cross-Fade: Moving between connected entities within the panel smoothly fades the inner text without jarring frame movements.
Canvas Visual Feedback: Selecting nodes on the relationship graph triggers a soft, glowing ripple underlay animation.

Workspace State Persistence: Restores your workspace exactly as you left it. Sidebar toggles, active tools, selected entities, and detailed Zen mode writing progress are now safely remembered per vault.

Smart Proposal Throttle: Auto-scan triggers are now paused when an entity already has 5 or more connections, preventing AI generation clutter. Includes an optional manual scan trigger and an increased 5-second buffer when navigating.

title: The Spatial & Scratchpad Update
highlights: QuickNote Scratchpad: A lightning-fast overlay (Ctrl+I / Cmd+I) to dump ideas instantly without losing your flow.
Make Entity: Instantly convert fleeting note scraps into fully structured Codex Cryptica entities (Characters, Locations, Items, Factions, or Events) using the Oracle AI engine.

title: The Mobile Ergonomics Update
highlights: Mobile Graph Controls: A compact toggle menu for graph actions, maximizing screen space for lore exploration on small devices.
Real-time Vault Stats: The vault selector now correctly displays the actual number of entities stored in every campaign.
Performance Boost: Smoother vault loading and snappier search indexing, especially for large knowledge bases.
Keyless AI Node Merging: Core AI-powered organization features now work without requiring a personal API key.

title: The Aesthetic Graph Update
highlights: Themed Graph Nodes: High-contrast, category-tinted nodes for better visual grouping and hierarchy at a glance.
Intelligent Graph Clustering: Improved layout logic that creates tighter, more intuitive connectivity clouds.
Unified Image Lightbox: A powerful new popout viewer for all character and location art across the application.
Compact Zen Mode: A more streamlined writing interface that prioritizes screen space for your content.

title: The Discovery Update
highlights: Entity Alias Support: Add multiple names to your characters and locations for more flexible search and cross-referencing.
Adjustable Workspace: Resizable sidebars allow you to customize the interface for your specific editing workflow.
Interactive Label Filtering: Easily discover related entities using advanced multi-label filtering in the explorer.
Responsive AI Oracle: A faster, more responsive AI chat experience that stays out of your way while you work.

title: The Tactical Explorer Update
highlights: Label-Grouped Explorer: Organize your vault by labels with collapsible sections and persisted view preferences.
VTT Entity List: Access your entire vault directly from the VTT sidebar to streamline encounter management.
Token Drag-and-Drop: Seamlessly place tokens on tactical maps by dragging entities from the sidebar.
Zen Popout Refinements: Enhanced reliability and error handling for detached entity view windows.

title: The Playable Tabletop Update
highlights: Data-Native VTT: Turn your maps into playable, tactical encounters directly linked to your lore.
Peer-to-Peer Multiplayer: Host zero-setup sessions and invite players directly to your maps with real-time sync.
Fantasy Theme Refresh: A massive visual overhaul with deep fantasy aesthetics, cohesive typography (Alegreya), and rich styling.
In-App Changelog: Automatic notifications to keep you up to date on new features.

title: The Living Hub Update
highlights: Vault Front Page: A completely redesigned dashboard offering a living briefing room, pinned notes, and recent activity.
Traditional Entity Explorer: A powerful new sidebar and focus mode for deep, distraction-free entity editing.
Free Oracle Tier: Everyone now gets access to the Lore Oracle's core features out of the box.

title: The Spatial Canvas Update
highlights: Infinite Spatial Canvas: A massive new way to visually organize, group, and connect your entities outside the strict graph constraints.
Integrated Die Roller: Fully featured, fair 3D die rolling directly in your workspace.
Pop-out Help & Guides: A comprehensive, dockable help system to guide you through mastering Codex Cryptica.

title: The Robust Storage Update
highlights: OPFS & Dexie Integration: A total rewrite of the local storage engine for lightning-fast performance and metadata caching.
Multi-Campaign Switching: Seamlessly jump between different isolated vaults and campaigns.
Robust Local & Cloud Sync: Bulletproof Google Drive synchronization paired with local-first file system mirroring.

title: The Oracle Ascension Update
highlights: Chat Commands & Proposer: Ask the AI to propose new connections, generate images, or analyze plot holes directly from the chat.
Image Generation: Distill your entity descriptions into stunning, AI-generated character and location art.
Smart PDF Import: Drop lore bibles or PDFs onto the screen to have them automatically parsed and mapped into your graph.

title: The World Timeline Update
highlights: World Timeline: A chronological view of your world's events, eras, and history.
Node Merging: Combine duplicate or related entities into a single, cohesive node.
Rich Text Formatting: Enhanced markdown support for more expressive and readable notes.

title: The Advanced Graph Update
highlights: Fog of War for Graph: Hide unrevealed nodes from players during shared sessions or exports.
Central Node Orbit: Focus on a single entity and see its immediate connections orbit around it.
Connection Labels: Add descriptive text to the lines connecting your entities.

title: The Customization Update
highlights: Styling Templates: Apply custom visual themes to specific nodes or categories.
Entity Labeling: Tag and organize entities with custom, color-coded labels.
Node Read Mode: A clean, distraction-free view for reading long-form entity content.

title: The Oracle Intelligence Update
highlights: Lore Oracle Intelligence: The AI assistant can now answer complex questions about your specific world lore.
Oracle RAG Improvements: Vastly improved retrieval accuracy ensures the AI pulls exactly the right context.
Oracle Data Parsing: The AI can extract structured data directly from your text notes.

title: The Campaign Management Update
highlights: Share Campaigns: Generate read-only links to share your world with players.
Campaign Date Picker: Set and track the current in-world date for your sessions.
Flexible Categories: Create custom entity types beyond the default schema.

title: The Graph Engine Update
highlights: Minimap Navigation: Quickly pan around massive knowledge graphs using the new minimap.
Graph Focus Mode: Isolate sub-graphs and filter out noise for deep-dive worldbuilding.
Delete Nodes: Safely remove entities and automatically clean up orphaned connections.

title: The Search & Discovery Update
highlights: Fuzzy Search: Instantly find any entity, connection, or text snippet across your entire vault.
Mobile UX Refinements: Improved touch targets, sidebar navigation, and sync feedback for mobile devices.
Performance Improvements: Large graph rendering and search indexing optimizations.

title: The Foundations Update
highlights: Core Entity Schema: Established the foundational Markdown and YAML structure for all data.
Svelte Sync Engine: The first iteration of local-first reactivity across the graph and editor.
Google Drive Mirroring: Automatic, silent backups of your local vault to the cloud.
